title: Device Home Screen - Power off Headset while in the app
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app UI does not update to show headset as disconnected when headset is powered off
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected and appears on the Home screen.
3. Power off the connected headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
4. Observe the app's Home screen UI for the device status.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen should update to show the headset as disconnected (e.g., "Disconnected" status or the device card should indicate no connection).
